 012: def prim_mst(int n):
 013:     """Compute MST of n-node weighted graph using Prim's algorithm with C arrays."""
+014:     cdef long long INF = 10 ** 18
  __pyx_v_INF = 0xde0b6b3a7640000;

 015:     cdef int i, j, u, v
 016:     cdef int w, t
 017:     cdef long long min_key_val
+018:     cdef long long total_weight = 0
  __pyx_v_total_weight = 0;

+019:     cdef long long max_edge = 0
  __pyx_v_max_edge = 0;

+020:     cdef long long min_edge = INF
  __pyx_v_min_edge = __pyx_v_INF;

 021: 
 022:     # Build adjacency using edge arrays
 023:     # Each node has up to 5 edges, but edges are bidirectional so up to 10 per node
 024:     # Use CSR-like format: for each node store offset and edges
 025:     # First count edges per node
+026:     cdef int max_edges_per_node = 20  # generous upper bound
  __pyx_v_max_edges_per_node = 20;

+027:     cdef int *adj_count = <int *>malloc(n * sizeof(int))
  __pyx_v_adj_count = ((int *)malloc((__pyx_v_n * (sizeof(int)))));

  __pyx_v_in_mst = ((int *)malloc((__pyx_v_n * (sizeof(int)))));
